items.title: Commentary: Tariffs are denting profits, and maybe soon your portfolio
items.description: Dozens of companies are reporting lower profits caused by Trump's tariffs. Stock values haven't adjusted — yet.

items.title: Do Wall Street Analysts Like Procter & Gamble Stock?
items.description: While Procter & Gamble has lagged behind the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook on the stock’s prospects.
